draft:
To Whom it May Concern:

I am writing to provide my strongest recommendation for Mr. Rohan Soman as an individual of extraordinary ability in the field of AI music technology and multisensory user experiences. As a seasoned fintech investor and entrepreneur, I have had the opportunity to evaluate numerous professionals across various industries, and Mr. Soman stands out as a truly remarkable talent.

I am the Co-Founder and General Partner at Future Horizons Capital (FHC), a seed-focused venture capital firm investing in transformative fintech companies globally. Since our founding in 2019, we have managed approximately $225 million across two funds and have built a portfolio of over 60 companies. Our investment strategy focuses on early-stage fintech startups, including vertical SaaS and marketplace businesses, and we have a strong presence in the US, Latin America, and Africa.

Before founding FHC, I led the Brightside Ventures fund, part of the renowned Brightside Startups network, from January 2016 to August 2022. This fund focuses on global technology businesses impacting the financial sector, and under my leadership, we made significant early investments in companies like Enoch, Breeze, and WavePay. My entrepreneurial journey includes multiple successful exits, such as co-founding PayChase, a payment comparison platform acquired by Groupon in 2012, and LeafyBite, a health food company. I also co-founded The Vision Pitch Podcast, which was acquired by Audible Media and later Spotify.

My educational background includes an MBA from the University of Virginia and a Bachelor of Science in HCI and Business from Princeton University. This academic foundation, combined with my extensive experience in fintech and entrepreneurship, has equipped me with the skills and insights to recognize and support exceptional talent like Mr. Soman.

I have had the privilege of knowing Mr. Rohan Soman for several years, during which time I have had the opportunity to observe his remarkable talents and contributions to the field of AI music technology and multisensory user experiences. Our professional relationship began through our mutual involvement in the technology and startup ecosystem, where we have crossed paths at various industry events and conferences. Over time, I have come to deeply respect and admire Mr. Soman's work and his unwavering commitment to innovation.

Mr. Soman is a dynamic and visionary tech entrepreneur and product professional with a rich blend of expertise in engineering and design. His distinguished career features roles at industry-leading companies like Spotify, Samsung, and VisionTech, reflecting a track record of innovative product development and strategic leadership. As the founder and CEO of HarmonyAI, Mr. Soman has spearheaded the creation of a groundbreaking AI content platform, revolutionizing the way users create music and podcasts.

HarmonyAI is a state-of-the-art AI music creation platform that allows users to create music and podcasts with ease. The platform uses generative AI to help users brainstorm and translate their stories into musical reality. With over 1 million songs generated by more than 800,000 creators, HarmonyAI is on a mission to democratize music creation. The platform has been featured in various media outlets, including Innovators Daily, Music Future, and The City Herald, highlighting its innovative approach and impact on the music industry.

As the founder and CEO of HarmonyAI, Mr. Soman has been instrumental in building this state-of-the-art platform. His leadership and vision have driven the development of the AI music creation tools that empower users to easily create music and podcasts. By leveraging his expertise in engineering and design, Mr. Soman has successfully translated complex AI technologies into user-friendly solutions that cater to both amateur and professional creators.

Mr. Soman's ability to lead cross-functional teams and foster a culture of innovation has been critical to the success of HarmonyAI. His strategic insights and hands-on approach have ensured that the platform continuously evolves to meet the needs of its growing user base. By democratizing access to advanced music creation tools, Mr. Soman is not only transforming the way music is made but also inspiring a new generation of creators to explore their artistic potential.

Under Mr. Soman's leadership, HarmonyAI has achieved significant milestones, including generating over 1 million songs and attracting more than 800,000 creators to the platform. His unwavering commitment to excellence and his passion for pushing the boundaries of what's possible in AI music technology have positioned HarmonyAI as a leader in the industry. Mr. Soman's remarkable achievements with HarmonyAI are a testament to his extraordinary abilities and his dedication to making a lasting impact in the world of music technology.

Before founding HarmonyAI, Mr. Soman held several notable positions that further demonstrate his extraordinary abilities. At Spotify, he served as a Product Manager from January 2020 to May 2023, where he led product strategy, roadmap, vision, and execution within Spotify's music creation business unit, SoundBlend. Working with a cross-functional team of engineers, designers, researchers, and data scientists, he transformed SoundBlend into a real-time collaboration app, resulting in a fourfold increase in studio collaboration time. His work at Spotify underscored his talent for driving innovation and delivering impactful solutions in the music technology space.

Prior to his tenure at Spotify, Mr. Soman was a UX Designer at VisionTech in Stockholm, Sweden, from August 2017 to December 2019. During this period, he designed eye-tracking based interactions for dual-display devices and identified opportunities in eye-tracking based AR interactions, filing four patents and being awarded the top innovator of Q1 2019. His work on smartphone eye-tracking interactions and visually aware voice assistants highlighted his ability to blend cutting-edge technology with user-centric design principles.

Mr. Soman's experience also includes significant contributions at Samsung Electronics, where he served as a Lead Designer from June 2016 to March 2017. He was involved in designing the 'Axis' Voice Assistant, focusing on personality and UX principles, and co-worked with field experts to identify major use cases. His efforts resulted in two patents and 10 million daily active users for Samsung products. As a Senior Designer from August 2014 to May 2016, he designed interaction paradigms for voice assistant-enabled wireless headphones and an IoT-enabled Companion Robot, with one patent pending. His work at Samsung demonstrated his ability to lead innovative projects and deliver user-friendly solutions in the field of consumer electronics.

Mr. Soman's educational background further complements his professional achievements. He holds a Master of Design in Interaction Design from the Indian Institute of Technology, Delhi, completed in 2014. This advanced degree provided him with a strong foundation in user-centered design and interaction principles, which he has effectively applied throughout his career. Additionally, he earned a Bachelor of Engineering in Information Technology from Indore Institute of Technology in 2011, equipping him with the technical skills necessary to excel in the rapidly evolving field of technology and design.

Throughout his career, Mr. Soman has consistently demonstrated a unique ability to blend technical expertise with creative vision, resulting in innovative products and solutions that have made a significant impact across various industries. His diverse experiences at leading companies like Spotify, VisionTech, and Samsung Electronics, coupled with his strong educational background, have equipped him with the skills and insights necessary to drive meaningful change in the fields of AI music technology and multisensory user experiences.

In conclusion, Mr. Soman's remarkable achievements and contributions in the fields of AI music technology and multisensory user experiences are a testament to his extraordinary abilities. His leadership and vision have driven the success of HarmonyAI, transforming it into a state-of-the-art platform that democratizes music creation for users worldwide. His diverse experiences at leading companies like Spotify, VisionTech, and Samsung Electronics, coupled with his strong educational background, have equipped him with the skills and insights necessary to drive meaningful change in these industries.

Mr. Soman's ability to blend technical expertise with creative vision has resulted in innovative products and solutions that have made a significant impact across various sectors. His unwavering commitment to excellence and his passion for pushing the boundaries of what's possible in AI music technology have positioned him as a leader in the industry. As he continues to make strides in his career, I have no doubt that Mr. Soman will continue to break new ground and inspire a new generation of creators and innovators.

It has been an honor to witness Mr. Soman's journey and to see firsthand the remarkable impact he has had on the fields of AI music technology and multisensory user experiences. His dedication, talent, and vision are truly extraordinary, and I am confident that he will continue to make significant contributions to the industry for years to come.

If you have any further questions or require additional information, please do not hesitate to contact me.

Sincerely,

Vikram JainCo-Founder & General PartnerFuture Horizons Capital [email contact here]
final:
To Whom it May Concern:

I am pleased to offer this letter as a recommendation for Mr. Rohan Soman's visa petition. Mr. Soman is an extraordinary individual with extensive expertise in product management, entrepreneurship, AI music technology and multisensory user experiences. As a seasoned fintech investor and entrepreneur, I have had the opportunity to evaluate numerous professionals across various industries, and Mr. Soman stands out as a truly remarkable talent.

To better place my comments in context, I am the Co-Founder and General Partner of Future Horizons Capital (FHC), an early-stage fintech fund that leads rounds in pre-seed and seed-stage fintech companies globally. At FHC, we are dedicated to leading the charge in early-stage technology investments. As co-founder, I bring nearly two decades of experience in the tech industry and mentoring startup founders to a venture capital firm that is investing globally as well as shaping the future of entire industries. With our $225 million fund, we focus on pre-seed and seed-stage companies, supporting visionary founders who are redefining various sectors.

Beyond Future Horizons Capital, I have extensive experience in the field of investing and company building broadly, particularly in the San Francisco Bay Area. My journey in venture capital began with founding Brightside Ventures, where I invested in early-stage fintech startups. My entrepreneurial experience includes co-founding PayChase, a payments company that was acquired by Groupon, where I then served as Vice President of Business Development. Beyond fintech, I've co-founded The Vision Pitch Podcast, later acquired by Audible Media/Spotify, and LeafyBite, a successful healthy food company. My professional background also includes roles at The Consulting Collective and a position as an Adjunct Professor at the Illinois Institute of Technology.

Throughout my career, I've been dedicated to identifying and nurturing founders who are reshaping and innovating industries with new and emerging technologies, and Mr. Soman is a prime example. As a dynamic and visionary tech entrepreneur, he brings a unique blend of expertise in both engineering and design. His impressive career includes key roles at leading companies like Spotify, Samsung, and VisionTech, showcasing a strong track record in innovative product development and strategic leadership. As the founder and CEO of HarmonyAI, Mr. Soman has led the creation of an innovative AI content platform that is revolutionizing the way users create music and podcasts.

HarmonyAI is a state-of-the-art AI music creation platform that allows users to create music and podcasts with ease. The platform uses generative AI to help users brainstorm and translate their stories into musical reality. With over 1 million songs generated by more than 800,000 creators, HarmonyAI is on a mission to democratize music creation. The platform has been featured in various media outlets, including Innovators Daily, Music Future, and The City Herald, highlighting its innovative approach and impact on the music industry.

As the founder and CEO of HarmonyAI, Mr. Soman has been instrumental in building this state-of-the-art platform. His leadership and vision have driven the development of the AI music creation tools that empower users to easily create music and podcasts. By leveraging his expertise in engineering and design, Mr. Soman has successfully translated complex AI technologies into user-friendly solutions that cater to both amateur and professional creators.

Mr. Soman's ability to lead cross-functional teams and foster a culture of innovation has been critical to the success of HarmonyAI. His strategic insights and hands-on approach have ensured that the platform continuously evolves to meet the needs of its growing user base. By democratizing access to advanced music creation tools, Mr. Soman is not only transforming the way music is made but also inspiring a new generation of creators to explore their artistic potential.

Under Mr. Soman's leadership, HarmonyAI has achieved significant milestones, including generating over 1 million songs and attracting more than 800,000 creators to the platform. His unwavering commitment to excellence and his passion for pushing the boundaries of what's possible in AI music technology have positioned HarmonyAI as a leader in the industry. Mr. Soman's remarkable achievements with HarmonyAI are a testament to his extraordinary abilities and his dedication to making a lasting impact in the world of music technology.

Before founding HarmonyAI, Mr. Soman played a crucial role at Spotify as a Product Manager from January 2020 to May 2023. He was instrumental in defining and executing the product strategy, roadmap, and vision for Spotify's music creation division, SoundBlend. Under his leadership, SoundBlend was transformed into a real-time collaboration app, resulting in a remarkable fourfold increase in studio collaboration time. Mr. Soman's innovative approach enhanced the user experience and set new standards for collaborative music creation technology. His efforts reinforced Spotify's position as a leader in music technology, showcasing his remarkable ability to drive innovation and deliver impactful solutions in the industry.

Earlier in his career, Mr. Soman also played a vital role at Samsung Electronics as a Lead Designer, where he leveraged his expertise to contribute heavily to the development of the 'Axis' Voice Assistant. He focused on enhancing personality and UX principles, collaborating with field experts to identify key use cases. His efforts led to two patents and reached 60 million users through Samsung products. Earlier, as a Senior Designer, he crafted interaction paradigms for voice assistant-enabled wireless headphones and an IoT-enabled Companion Robot, with another patent pending. His work at Samsung highlighted his capacity to lead innovative projects and deliver user-friendly solutions in the consumer electronics sector.

Beyond his professional achievements, Mr. Soman is actively involved with the Emerald Network Syndicate, an angel investment syndicate on the AngelList Venture platform, comprised of a select network of distinguished ex-Spotify employees. His extraordinary product management and entrepreneurship expertise enable him to contribute significantly to this collective. Together, they pool entrepreneurial, product, and investment knowledge to support promising early-stage startups. The syndicate leverages capital from accredited investors to provide financial backing and strategic guidance, helping startups thrive in the competitive tech ecosystem. Mr. Soman's membership underscores his commitment to nurturing innovation and supporting the next generation of entrepreneurs.

In reflecting on Mr. Soman's remarkable career, it is clear that his unique blend of technical expertise, leadership, and innovative vision positions him as a pioneer in both the tech and music industries. His ability to foster impactful collaborations, whether through leading cross-functional teams or participating in strategic investment groups like the Emerald Network Syndicate, demonstrates his dedication to advancing technology and inspiring future innovators. Mr. Soman’s journey, from transforming platforms at major companies like Spotify and Samsung to launching and leading groundbreaking startups, is a testament to his outstanding capabilities and commitment to shaping the future of technology.

In conclusion, I am confident that Mr. Soman will continue to be a transformative figure in the fields of AI music technology and product management. His contributions have not only set new industry standards but also paved the way for innovative approaches that others can follow. I wholeheartedly recommend him for his visa petition, knowing that his extraordinary talents will bring significant value to any opportunity he pursues. Should you have any questions or require further information regarding this recommendation, please do not hesitate to contact me.

Yours truly, 



Vikram Jain 
Co-Founder & General Partner 
Future Horizons Capital 
vikram@fhc.vc
